case_title: DEVOTA PILAR SHAY VS. CATHERINE KOSTLAN

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT KOSTLAN, CATHERINE HEARING SET FOR MAR-08-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,450.00 FILED BY SHAY, DEVOTA PILAR AS TO DEFENDANT KOSTLAN, CATHERINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2009 BY MONICA F. WILEY. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAY, DEVOTA PILAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KOSTLAN, CATHERINE $4,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,530.00, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KOSTLAN, CATHERINE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED NOV-02-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KOSTLAN, CATHERINE
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SHAY, DEVOTA PILAR
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-08-2010 IS CONTINUED TO MAR-25-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BENCH LETTER ISSUED.
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2010 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-20-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAY, DEVOTA PILAR AS TO DEFENDANT KOSTLAN, CATHERINE
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: FEB-04-2010 AS TO DEFENDANT KOSTLAN, CATHERINE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,602.45 AS TO DEFENDANT KOSTLAN, CATHERINE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2009 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2010 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES TO JUL-19-2010 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. BENCH LETTER WITHDRAWN. PARTIES AGRE THAT DEFENDANT WILL OVER NIGHT $255.00 TOMORROW. DEFENDANT WILL PAY $250 PER MONTH STARTING 4/1//10 AND THE 10TH OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE TO 12/20/10 FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT.
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, CATHERINE KOSTLAN. NO APPEARANCES. PLEASE SEE ROA ENTRY OF MARCH 29, 2010.
